metadata.description: Route keyword matrix for 90 P1 route combinations (10 origins x 9 destinations)
metadata.methodology: Logic-based keyword research. No SEMrush/Ahrefs. Volume estimates derived from: expat population data, migration corridors, pet ownership rates, regulatory complexity (drives search), English-language search proportion. Competition assessed via SERP landscape analysis: presence of dedicated route pages, PetRelocation coverage, forum dominance.
query_patterns: cost to ship dog/pet from [origin] to [destination]
how to bring pet to [destination] from [origin]

priority_scoring.description: 1-10 scale. Factors: estimated volume, commercial value per booking, competition gap, regulatory complexity (content depth potential), route frequency (how many airlines serve it).
priority_scoring.10: Must-build first. High volume, high value, zero competition.
priority_scoring.7-9: Core P1 routes. Build in first batch.
priority_scoring.4-6: Solid routes. Build in second batch within P1.
priority_scoring.1-3: Lower priority within P1. Build last or defer.

tier_1_build_first.description: Routes scoring 8-10. Highest estimated volume + commercial value + competition gap. Build these first.

tier_2_core.description: Routes scoring 5-7. Good volume and value. Core P1 content.

tier_3_complete.description: Routes scoring 1-4. Lower volume but needed for completeness and internal linking.

keywords.keyword: pet transport uk to usa
ship dog from uk to usa
pet relocation uk to america
bring pet to usa from uk
cost to ship dog from uk to usa
cdc dog import requirements from uk
flying with pet from uk to us

routes.opportunity: No dedicated UK-to-USA route page in top 10. PetRelocation has a USA country page but not a UK-to-USA specific page. CDC rules changed Aug 2024, creating fresh content demand.
routes.regulatory_notes: UK is CDC low-risk country. Dogs need: CDC Dog Import Form, microchip, appear healthy, 6+ months old. No rabies titre test required. Cats: zero federal requirements. Relatively straightforward route.
content_angles: UK Pet Travel Scheme for return journey
Cat import is effortless (no federal requirements)
Airline comparison (BA cargo vs US carriers cabin)

keywords.keyword: pet transport uk to dubai
ship dog from uk to dubai
pet relocation uk to uae
move pet to dubai from uk
cost to ship pet from uk to dubai
dubai pet import rules from uk
flying with dog to dubai from london

routes.opportunity: Massive UK expat population in Dubai. High booking values. No dedicated route page competes. Local companies have generic pages but not route-specific content.
routes.regulatory_notes: UAE requires: import permit from municipality, rabies vaccination, health certificate, microchip. No quarantine for cats/dogs from UK. Emirates and Etihad cargo only (no cabin). BA also cargo only via PetAir UK.
content_angles: All airlines cargo-only on this route
Return journey complications (UAE is CDC high-risk)
Huge British expat community in Dubai

keywords.keyword: pet transport uk to australia
ship dog from uk to australia
pet relocation uk to australia
move pet to australia from uk
cost to ship dog from uk to australia
australia quarantine for pets from uk
how long is quarantine for pets in australia
bringing dog to australia from england

routes.opportunity: UK-Australia is likely the highest search volume pet transport route globally. Massive UK-Australia migration. Australia's strict quarantine drives enormous search demand. PetRelocation has a good Australia page but NOT a UK-to-Australia route page. Our route page combining UK export + AU import + airline options + quarantine details would be the only comprehensive resource.
routes.regulatory_notes: UK is Australia DAFF Group 3. Minimum 10-day quarantine at Mickleham. Import permit required. Rabies titre test required. Health certificate timing strict. 6+ month planning recommended. Qantas and Singapore Airlines primary cargo carriers. All cargo-only.
content_angles: Australia's strict biosecurity (most regulated in world)
Return journey from AU to UK much simpler

keywords.keyword: pet transport uk to canada
ship dog from uk to canada
bring pet to canada from uk
cost to ship pet uk to canada

routes.opportunity: Moderate expat flow. Canada has relatively straightforward pet import rules. Low competition.
routes.regulatory_notes: Canada: rabies vaccination required for dogs 3+ months, health certificate within 3 days if commercially imported. CFIA requirements. No quarantine. CDC low-risk for return to US.

keywords.keyword: pet transport uk to germany
bring dog to germany from uk
pet travel uk to germany after brexit
animal health certificate uk to germany

routes.opportunity: Post-Brexit complications created fresh demand. UK to EU now requires AHC instead of pet passport. High value content angle.
routes.regulatory_notes: Post-Brexit: GB pet passports no longer valid for EU entry. Need animal health certificate. Standard EU rules: microchip, rabies, 21-day wait. Germany may have breed-specific legislation (Kampfhunde).

keywords.keyword: pet transport uk to france
take dog to france from uk
pet travel uk to france after brexit
eurotunnel with pet uk to france
animal health certificate for france

routes.opportunity: Very high volume route for pet TRAVEL (holidays) not just relocation. Eurotunnel/ferry options make this unique. Post-Brexit rules changed everything.
routes.regulatory_notes: Same EU entry rules as Germany. Strong Eurotunnel and ferry options. AHC required post-Brexit. France: Category 1 dangerous dogs banned (Pit Bull type, Boerboel). Tapeworm treatment required by France.
content_angles: Holiday pet travel vs permanent relocation

routes.opportunity: UK is AVS Category A for Singapore (no quarantine). But process still complex (licence, vaccination, health cert). Strong UK expat presence in Singapore.
routes.regulatory_notes: UK is Singapore AVS Category A. No quarantine. But import licence required, microchip, health certificate, core vaccinations. Dogs: distemper/hepatitis/parvo. Singapore Airlines and BA cargo.
content_angles: All cargo-only airlines on this route

content_angles: BNO visa driving UK-to-HK pet transport demand

content_angles: Johannesburg OR Tambo as arrival point
SAA allows cabin for small pets

routes.opportunity: UAE is CDC HIGH-RISK for dog rabies. This creates complex requirements (foreign-vaccinated dog process, CDC-registered facility, possible 28-day quarantine). High content value due to complexity.
routes.regulatory_notes: UAE is CDC high-risk. Foreign-vaccinated dogs need: Certification of Foreign Rabies Vaccination form, CDC-approved rabies titre test (or 28-day quarantine at CDC facility), reservation at CDC-registered facility, must arrive at airport with facility. USDA additional requirements. Cats: no federal requirements.
content_angles: UAE is CDC high-risk: complex dog import process
Cats have zero federal requirements (massive contrast)

routes.opportunity: Extremely high demand. Large expat flow UAE to AU. Complex route: UAE may not be DAFF-approved; pet may need to transit through approved country. Highest complexity = highest content value.
routes.regulatory_notes: UAE may not be a DAFF-approved country for direct import. Pet may need to reside in approved country (e.g. UK) to complete process. If approved: Group 4/5 requirements, titre test, 10+ day quarantine. 6+ month planning minimum. Most complex route in matrix.
content_angles: Potentially the most complex pet transport route
